statement: In every magma, Equation 884 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (y * z))`) implies Equation 3695 (`x * x = (y * z) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0480
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op y z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op y z) (op x y))
